description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on an ubuntu-latest environment. The workflow accepts four inputs: dfhack_repo, dfhack_ref, scripts_repo, and scripts_ref. It installs Lua, clones the DFHack repository, and optionally clones a scripts repository. The workflow then performs several linting tasks, including checking for whitespace issues, validating Authors.rst, detecting missing documentation, and verifying Lua syntax.
